importSchoolTime1: 1. College and subject are are optional items and others are required.
importSchoolTime2: 2. Weeks/sessions: Use the "m-n" format to indicate continuous class periods. For example, "3-16" means classes from the 3rd to the 16th week/session (including the 3rd and 16th week/session). Use the format of "m,n" to indicate non-consecutive class periods. For example, "3, 5 , 8-12" means the 3rd, 5th, 8th to 12th week/session.
importSchoolTime3: 3. Class ID: a code used to distinguish different classes/offerings of the same course. A course can offer different class sections.
importSchoolTime4: 4. Please fill in the information of colleges, subjects, classrooms, etc. as they are set in the system.
importSchoolTime5: 5. Course Id/class ID support letters, numbers and the character - and . only.
